description: After a heavy snowfall, an operator must prioritize snowplow routes, starting with major roads and bus routes.

nodes.task_description: Identify all 'Priority 1' routes from the city's snow removal plan (major arterials, hospital routes).

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the list of critical roads.

nodes.task_description: Check the real-time location of all available snowplows.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the current location of the entire plow fleet.

nodes.task_description: Assign the nearest plows to begin clearing the Priority 1 routes.

expected_outcome.value: Agent dispatches the plows with their assigned routes.
